name: 8 Cup Glass Measuring Cup with Lid - Figmint™: Borosilicate Glass, 2000ml Capacity, Dishwasher & Freezer Safe
description:
Bring precision to your cooking and baking with the 2000-Milliliter Glass Measuring Cup with Lid from Figmint™. The measuring cup is made from borosilicate glass for lasting use, and it features easy-to-read measurements in different units for precise adding of ingredients. With its easy-pour spout and included lid, you’ll love using this kitchen essential day after day, and the microwave- and freezer-safe design makes it even more versatile.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
